overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing two characters traveling through a dark forest at night. One character rides a horse equipped with a side lantern while another walks ahead, navigating a winding dirt trail surrounded by tall pine trees and rocky outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with large boulders

agents.ego_description: riding a horse equipped with a side lantern through a forest trail, following a walking companion

notable_agents.action: walking steadily ahead on the trail, leading the way through the forest

entered.detail: massive gray rock outcrop with rough texture lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen trees forming a dense canopy overhead
narrow winding dirt path through the forest illuminated by the horse lantern

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with the camera following a horse rider from behind. A massive rock formation dominates the left side of the path while tall pine trees create a dense canopy overhead. The horse's lantern casts a warm glow on the dirt trail ahead as the rider follows a walking companion through the winding path.

events.description: the large rock formation on the left recedes from view as the trail enters deeper forest

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through the dense forest interior, maintaining a steady pace behind the walking companion

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the forest path, navigating the trail as it winds through dense trees

entered.detail: dense bushes and ferns lining the sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues into the deep forest interior, with the rocky terrain now replaced by dense undergrowth and thick pine stands on both sides. The canopy overhead blocks most of the moonlight, making the horse lantern the primary light source. The two characters maintain their steady pace along the winding dirt path as they travel deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest trail that shifts from a rocky passage into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins by following a horse rider from behind, where a massive rock formation looms over the left side of the path beneath a canopy of tall pine trees. As the rider and their walking companion progress, the rocky terrain gradually gives way to thick undergrowth and dense pine stands on both sides of the winding dirt trail. The scene then deepens into the forest interior, where the overhead canopy further obscures the moonlight, leaving the horse's lantern as the primary source of warm light. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace as the characters travel further into the oppressive darkness of the woods.
